title: BioShock® 2

notes: It is strange. All works as native until it loads the first level. Then it ask 'press space to continue' and it does not react to any key press so I cannot continue. The keyboard works OK when changing preferences in the menu.
title: BioShock® 2

notes: Tested the first minutes of single player. With default settings, the game menu are sluggish and textures in game are loaded at very low resolution. Applying the noesync fix makes the game run like native.
title: BioShock® 2

notes: Failed. Won't work past loading screen
title: BioShock® 2

notes:
Proton beta 3.16-4 does not work. Notabilly using wine D3d11 locks up the pc until you kill the task using ctl + alt + f1-6.

Proton 3.7-8 does work out of the box without any launch options. Without disabling esync the texture quality is low, even when it says it is on high. Not because it is old but the resolution of some textures is like the signs of morrowind. In addition pressing escape causes the game to hang for about 10-20 seconds, while audio still plays in the background.

With esync disabled the game looks pretty good, no resolution issues but only works on the first level of the game. At the end of the first level, before the loading screen, the screen goes black, and stays black. I was able to open a terminal window with ctl + alt + t, but could not kill the process. I could kill wineserver fine but the game was still open with the black screen. In the end had to kill the process with the sigkill signal set.

There were also reports on the github page for this game of save corruption but I have not yet saved with my testing.
title: BioShock® 2
